title: Testimonials | Zo Computer

links.text: MiniMax 2.7 & Kimi K2.5 are free on Zo
Zo
Get started
Zo
Pricing
About
Newsletter
Blog
Download
Get started
“This is sooo cool. They made vibe servering into a product. Your own private cloud computer with AI.” Pieter Levels · @levelsio 727
“Personal OS, for everyone.” Ryo Lu · Head of Design, Cursor 210
“holy shit Zo Computer just clicked for me. absolutely sick. set up a Claude Skills MCP where I drop a link, Zo makes the skills, and hosts the MCP server. hugeee potential” Ian Kar · @iankar_
“I use Zo to keep an eye on weekend weather → book daybed at pool clubs – proof that it can be used for anything.” Julian Connor · Cofounder at Grailed
“Using Zo Computer to make a site to track all my habits and aggregate everything I work on with various automation scripts. Zo is such a good UX.” Noah · @noahgsolomon 30
“Dude Zo is amazing. Took me a bit to grok it but I'm totally blown away now.” Cristian Ciblis Bernardes · CEO at Autograph

“I use Zo for a million things - from curating an email newsletter sent to me every day on VC/startup news, to building a database of my contacts I can query via API. The possibilities are so endless.” Becca Lewy · Chief of Staff at Factorial
“Zo gave me my first ever taste of what it must be like to be a builder and it was intoxicating.” Vrijen Attawar · Founder at Careerspan

“Zo, please organize all my files. Zo, do you like the persistent memory system you built? Zo, create a version of this for other Zo users. Zo, email me a copy of that. I freaking love Zo.” Kira · @authentikkira

“Honestly I am so blown away by the product. I've been trying every single AI product that makes sense for me. Got Manus as soon as it dropped. But they often fail to meet expectations. This is the first product that I don't feel that way about, at all.” Toreyan Clarke · Marketing Lead at LTV
“This is truly new and exciting.” Guillermo Rauch · Vercel CEO
“Zo is not another AI app. It's an AI computer. It's a bold idea to reinvent the personal computer. This is the iPhone moment for servers.” Aditya Agrawal · @adityaag 94

“I think the approach is genius. Right now the main interface for AI is chat. What if the chat interface is now empowered to be your personal computer? But it's in the cloud and designed to your specific needs. And designed to build on itself.” Nick DeJesus · @dayhaysoos
“I love this and have always wanted it.” Sunil Pai · Cloudflare 57
“I had a magical experience where I had a file I wanted to check while I was out and I was able to text to get the answer.” Luke Miller · Ex-OpenAI Product
“The most evolved version of Notion would be Zo.” Sean Thielen · Innovation at Complex
“This is the notebook I've kind of been dreaming of.” Jesse Spevack · Software Engineer at Stripe

“This may sound like a paid promo but it isn't. Kimi claw is down so I gave Zo Computer a chance. It migrated itself... I have paid $18 for this and its just day 1. This is so good holy shit.” @kingofnowhere

“I run OpenClaw(s) on my own server and using compute from Zo.Computer. I've built agent infrastructure around it. I'm extremely bullish on it. But I expected adoption to stay technical for a while. It didn't.” Andrea · @acolombiadev
“Zo Computer as my personal AI server. This is how I run my OpenClaw, ZeroClaw, and other personal agents. It's become my baseline for everything.” Andrea Griffiths
“Zo replaced Squarespace, Calendly, ChatGPT, and Notion for me. I made $15k with my new booking website on Zo.” Anthea · Freediving and Yoga Instructor
“been messing around with zo computer. feels like a really convenient variant of openclaw without all the configs.” Arshan · @arshantwts
“Way more straightforward to spin things up than OpenClaw stuff, etc. This is tight as hell actually.” ClumpyFelchCheese · Reddit

“Zo is for modern mystics, automators, AI-freaks, solopreneurs, vibecoders, and anyone with a creative spark. It's a real Linux server in the cloud that you control through conversation. Deep tech knowledge is not needed. You just talk to the computer in the sky. How cool is that?!” exhuman · @3xhuman
“Been loving leveraging Zo’s UI with a mini claw and integrated zo secrets and skills!” John Lifrieri · @john_lifrieri

“I've been using @zocomputer for this. It's basically my chief of staff, second brain, productivity system all in one. Building out dashboards for each area of life. One example is a health dashboard that pulls my whoop and Apple data every few hours.” Jordan · @jordanvanhemert
“Hi this is insanely cool.” Jordan Scales · Webmaster at Notion, ex-Stripe

“Zo is literally the closest thing to an AI-native computer in the cloud you can get. Imagine if you could text or email your computer and have it do any task... that's what Zo is. Yes, the other services can get close to that by emulation, but it's not the same: Zo is your personal computer with a persistent disk, customizations, and everything. Legendary.” Josh · @jplhomer

“Ok this is soooo amazing I'm using it right now to help me create a database of travel outlets, then find relevant articles, pull out brands and pain points, then give me a new database including all the writers and editors so I can reach out to them. Days/weeks of work in like no time at all.” Kate · Founder, Mode Compression

“Zo Computer is awesome. I've been using it to build on the go while visiting family in India. Being able to build anywhere with a phone and an Internet connection is incredible.” Matt · Software Engineer at Stripe
“So Zo Computer is OpenClaw for normies right?” Mike Wigmore · @MikeWigmore
“i've had Zo Computer for 18 hours & have already decided to move my (very) active OpenAI, xAI, Anthropic & Gemini activities there & finally bridge my personal context via MCP” Peter

“couldn't you run openclaw on zo? its possible but it isnt necessary. zo do all the same things already tbh. i found it after exploring openclaw and it was the first thing i tested inside zo out of curiosity. also now that zo allows you to talk to it on telegram its even better” Rogue · @Rogue0114
“Zo is sick, it's gonna be like a snowball and it's just starting to roll for me.” Shreyans Bhansali · Cofounder at Maven

“I asked Zo to send me weekly updates on items I'd bookmarked etc. total delight how well it works + easy it was to set up. why pay for marked up SaaS when can have an internet computer that does whatever u say out of the box” Soren · @hypersoren

“Y'all Thanos-snapped ChatGPT, Claude, and Notion (and a few other minor ones) out of my stack. Imagine a product so good, using it saves you $100 a month. That's Zo Computer.” Vrijen Attawar (LinkedIn) · Founder at Careerspan

bodyText: MiniMax 2.7 & Kimi K2.5 are free on Zo Zo · Pricing About Newsletter Blog Resources Download Get started Testimonials Our users love Zo – the personal AI cloud computer. FEATURED “This is sooo cool. They made vibe servering into a product. Your own private cloud computer with AI.” Pieter Levels · @levelsio 727 “Personal OS, for everyone.” Ryo Lu · Head of Design, Cursor 210 “holy shit Zo Computer just clicked for me. absolutely sick. set up a Claude Skills MCP where I drop a link, Zo makes the skills, and hosts the MCP server. hugeee potential” Ian Kar · @iankar_ “I use Zo to keep an eye on weekend weather → book daybed at pool clubs – proof that it can be used for anything.” Julian Connor · Cofounder at Grailed “Using Zo Computer to make a site to track all my habits and aggregate everything I work on with various automation scripts. Zo is such a good UX.” Noah · @noahgsolomon 30 “Dude Zo is amazing. Took me a bit to grok it but I'm totally blown away now.” Cristian Ciblis Bernardes · CEO at Autograph “I use Zo for a million things - from curating an email newsletter sent to me every day on VC/startup news, to building a database of my contacts I can query via API. The possibilities are so endless.” Becca Lewy · Chief of Staff at Factorial “Zo gave me my first ever taste of what it must be like to be a builder and it was intoxicating.” Vrijen Attawar · Founder at Careerspan “I've been meaning to set up an email automation AI agent for a long time and considered hiring someone to do it. But vibed it out with Zo in an hour. Nice.” Alex · Staff Software Engineer at Groq “Zo, please organize all my files. Zo, do you like the persistent memory system you built? Zo, create a version of this for other Zo users. Zo, email me a copy of that. I freaking love Zo.” Kira · @authentikkira “Honestly I am so blown away by the product. I've been trying every single AI product that makes sense for me. Got Manus as soon as it dropped. But they often fail to meet expectations. This is the first product that I don't feel that way about, at all.” Toreyan Clarke · Marketing Lead at LTV “This is truly new and exciting.” Guillermo Rauch · Vercel CEO “Zo is not another AI app. It's an AI computer. It's a bold idea to reinvent the personal computer. This is the iPhone moment for servers.” Aditya Agrawal · @adityaag 94 “I think the approach is genius. Right now the main interface for AI is chat. What if the chat interface is now empowered to be your personal computer? But it's in the cloud and designed to your specific needs. And designed to build on itself.” Nick DeJesus · @dayhaysoos “I love this and have always wanted it.” Sunil Pai · Cloudflare 57 “I had a magical experience where I had a file I wanted to check while I was out and I was able to text to get the answer.” Luke Miller · Ex-OpenAI Product “The most evolved version of Notion would be Zo.” Sean Thielen · Innovation at Complex “This is the notebook I've kind of been dreaming of.” Jesse Spevack · Software Engineer at Stripe MORE TESTIMONIALS “This may sound like a paid promo but it isn't. Kimi claw is down so I gave Zo Computer a chance. It migrated itself... I have paid $18 for this and its just day 1. This is so good holy shit.” @kingofnowhere “I run OpenClaw(s) on my own server and using compute from Zo.Computer. I've built agent infrastructure around it. I'm extremely bullish on it. But I expected adoption to stay technical for a while. It didn't.” Andrea · @acolombiadev “Zo Computer as my personal AI server. This is how I run my OpenClaw, ZeroClaw, and other personal agents. It's become my baseline for everything.” Andrea Griffiths “Zo replaced Squarespace, Calendly, ChatGPT, and Notion for me. I made $15k with my new booking website on Zo.” Anthea · Freediving and Yoga Instructor “been messing around with zo computer. feels like a really convenient variant of openclaw without all the configs.” Arshan · @arshantwts “Way more straightforward to spin things up than OpenClaw stuff, etc. This is tight as hell actually.” ClumpyFelchCheese · Reddit “Zo is for modern mystics, automators, AI-freaks, solopreneurs, vibecoders, and anyone with a creative spark. It's a real Linux server in the cloud that you control through conversation. Deep tech knowledge is not needed. You just talk to the computer in the sky. How cool is that?!” exhuman · @3xhuman “Been loving leveraging Zo’s UI with a mini claw and integrated zo secrets and skills!” John Lifrieri · @john_lifrieri “I've been using @zocomputer for this. It's basically my chief of staff, second brain, productivity system all in one. Building out dashboards for each area of life. One example is a health dashboard that pulls my whoop and Apple data every few hours.” Jordan · @jordanvanhemert “Hi this is insanely cool.” Jordan Scales · Webmaster at Notion, ex-Stripe “Zo is literally the closest thing to an AI-native computer in the cloud you can get. Imagine if you could text or email your computer and have it do any task... that's what Zo is. Yes, the other services can get close to that by emulation, but it's not the same: Zo is your personal computer with a persistent disk, customizations, and everything. Legendary.” Josh · @jplhomer “It can see years of conceptual stuff from my Obsidian, but has direct access to coding LLMs.” Kamran · PhD candidate at CMU “Ok this is soooo amazing I'm using it right now to help me create a database of travel outlets, then find relevant articles, pull out brands and pain points, then give me a new database including all the writers and editors so I can reach out to them. Days/weeks of work in like no time at all.” Kate · Founder, Mode Compression “It has helped me with editing my paintings and playing with new ideas. I also love that I can text Zo anytime and ask for daily help with decluttering plans. As someone who works alone and does most everything myself, it's been really nice to have help!” Kathy “Genuinely feels like the most interesting take in the "personal AI computer" space.” Kausthub · Tech Lead at Susquehanna “Zo Computer is awesome. I've been using it to build on the go while visiting family in India. Being able to build anywhere with a phone and an Internet connection is incredible.” Matt · Software Engineer at Stripe “So Zo Computer is OpenClaw for normies right?” Mike Wigmore · @MikeWigmore “i've had Zo Computer for 18 hours & have already decided to move my (very) active OpenAI, xAI, Anthropic & Gemini activities there & finally bridge my personal context via MCP” Peter “couldn't you run openclaw on zo? its possible but it isnt necessary. zo do all the same things already tbh. i found it after exploring openclaw and it was the first thing i tested inside zo out of curiosity. also now that zo allows you to talk to it on telegram its even better” Rogue · @Rogue0114 “I'm completely in love with the concept of Zo.” Ryaan · Software Engineer at BandLab “I genuinely see limitless opportunities. I'd use this every day just in its current state.” Saharsha · Undergraduate Student at Princeton “Zo is sick, it's gonna be like a snowball and it's just starting to roll for me.” Shreyans Bhansali · Cofounder at Maven “I asked Zo to send me weekly updates on items I'd bookmarked etc. total delight how well it works + easy it was to set up. why pay for marked up SaaS when can have an internet computer that does whatever u say out of the box” Soren · @hypersoren “Y'all Thanos-snapped ChatGPT, Claude, and Notion (and a few other minor ones) out of my stack. Imagine a product so good, using it saves you $100 a month. That's Zo Computer.” Vrijen Attawar (LinkedIn) · Founder at Careerspan “It's literally exactly what I wish Siri could be.” Album “Right off the bat I canceled my n8n subscription” Cody “Zo is fucking amazing. God bless u. Thank you for building. I have an absolutely toxic todo list behavior and Zo is the first thing I've found that makes it more tenable.” Devin “Zo is probably the single most magical experience I've had using a computer in my adult life.” Lynn “Zo is by far the most enjoyable and complete way I interface with AI. Having something I can text to create automations with my connected apps and file system has been a hugeee unlock.” Noah “I really love what you have created. I am going to make it the centre of my workflow!” Peter “A computer in a safe place, frequently backed up, where the AI has control of everything on the computer and access to the CLI. Zo is unlocking that and I couldn't be more excited.” Rosson “It's really an elegant idea. I love it.” Tyler “I currently utilize over 50 different AI and productivity tools. Some paid subscriptions, some lifetime deals, and some freemium. From what I can see, Zo can replace a lot of these tools, and I hope to be able to consolidate my various subscriptions by using Zo instead.” “Literally sitting in front of my PC right now, thinking 'what the fuck that worked?'. Actual magic.” “I love the ability to control the context and narrative of what I'm orchestrating. I love the agency over what I'm building and the security over the work I create.” “Zo is the best thing I've come across for ages” “I had a ChatGPT Plus account but I just figured out how to do the main thing I had it for in Zo – and a bit better. So my money has changed hands lol.” “Conceptually, it's one of the coolest products I've come across.” “This has got to be the best interface for deep research that I have seen in a while” “I've been using Zo pretty heavily across my messy Drive/Notion/Dropbox world. Big fan of what you're building.” “I love it like a fat kid loves cake.” “I love that it's really great for non technical folks who shouldn't be messing with OpenClaw.” “Zo Computer is exactly what I've been waiting for – finally an excuse to dive into homelab/automation without the overhead.” “I'm so excited about Zo, I've dropped all work on the floor and am building a script to import all my X bookmarks.” “If ChatGPT is like having a window to AI, Zo Computer is like adding an in-law suite but you actually want to hang out there.” “This is actually a great idea and way less friction than my Nextcloud Hetzner setup” “ChatGPT and Claude are limited to chat and single integration. Zo keeps long context. It can also text me so I can work on the go while driving.” “Love your UI design, I could kiss whoever did it. It balances clean, opinionated, functional, and feature rich.” “Just set up Zo. Holy wow, first impressions are high, lovely UX” “I am loving how easy it is to integrate AI into my daily file management as a mindfulness practice instead of overwhelm.” “Zo is the first machine that actually feels like it was designed around how modern builders work, not how IT departments work.” “Of all the AI stuff that's happening right now, I'm the most excited about Zo” “It's like Anything but muuuuch better. I've been looking for something like it since June.” “I really enjoy using Zo. It can replace pricey SaaSs. I just ask Zo to do it. After some time, it works perfectly.” “Just getting started, but plan to potentially replace my many AI subscriptions such as Fabric.so, Mem.AI, Hyperlink, Notion, n8n, and all my vibe coding tools” “I was looking for a way to run OpenClaw but it was way too complicated, Zo does everything open claw does plus it has a UI and its own computer so you won't mess up yours, it's absolutely brilliant. I use it to show clients what their websites and things looks like in person. It's replaced my Google Pro subscription.” “I can already tell I'll be playing around with it for the rest of my life.” “not affiliated with Zo, but I love this service and it saves me money on other subscriptions for services like N8N, Dropbox, web hosting, and other LLMs.” “I just tried it, I loved it, the UI is so fcking good.” “It's so versatile and precise and there are so many features it blows my mind I don't know why more people haven't started using Zo.” “Zo makes launching services and vibe coding simple. When I don't know how to do something I literally just ask it.” “Zo rocks by the way. Anyone who has ever been slightly curious about running a home lab, it's a great cloud VM that comes with all sorts of handy automations.” PRODUCT Documentation Blog Newsletter Comparisons Pricing Skills Integrations Channels Models Product Updates INFORMATION FAQ Careers Brand Terms Privacy Help Center Contact Security COMMUNITY Discord LinkedIn X @zocomputer YouTube Testimonials Ambassadors Merch Zo Computer Company
